summary: Successfully restructured vertical padding in DynamicContentCarousel to consolidate all padding on the container element. Removed 'py-10 sm:py-16' from section element and changed container from 'py-10 md:py-15' to 'py-18 md:py-23'. Updated :before pseudo-element from 'before:-inset-y-8' to 'before:inset-y-0' so it matches container bounds exactly. Both TSX and PHP files updated in perfect sync. Build passed successfully. Inner charcoal padding remains visually identical at 72px mobile / 92px desktop with cleaner architecture.
nextSteps: QA team should verify inner charcoal padding appears identical to previous version
Test at all breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop) to confirm 72px mobile / 92px desktop padding
Note that outer spacing (section edge to charcoal edge) will be 0px instead of previous 8px mobile / 32px desktop - this is expected per the restructure
